parameters.query: SELECT id, title, description, lane, status, requested_by, requested_at, approved_at, approved_by, meta FROM gda_approval_queue ORDER BY requested_at DESC LIMIT 100;
=SELECT id, lane, status, approved_at, approved_by FROM gda_approval_queue WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}' LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:

return [{ json: { __status: item.__status, __body: item.__body } }];
